category_sources: source_facts.description says Linux kernel packet control tool; official netfilter iptables page says iptables configures Linux packet filtering rulesets and NAT.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is iptables; official netfilter project page is titled The netfilter.org iptables project.
docs_sources: Official netfilter project page describes iptables and links project documentation; netfilter documentation page includes iptables and HOWTO documentation.
repo_sources: Official netfilter iptables page states the current development version is accessed at https://git.netfilter.org/iptables/.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables list iptables/ip6tables/arptables/ebtables tools; official netfilter page describes packet filtering and NAT use.
